fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location of the internal put-away line.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number that is recorded on the item card or the stockkeeping unit card of the item being moved.

fields.name: From Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin from which the items to be put away should be taken.

fields.name: From Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone from which the items to be put away should be taken.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that you want to put away and have entered on the line.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be put away.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be put away, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled, expressed in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Put Away
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the line that is registered as put away.

fields.name: Qty. Put Away (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the line that is registered as put away, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Put-away Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in the put-away instructions that is assigned to be put away.

fields.name: Put-away Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in the put-away instructions assigned to be put away, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Contains the status of the internal put-away line. The options are: <Blank>, Partially Put Away, Completely Put Away.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of base units of measure, that are in the unit of measure, specified for the item on the line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a second description of the item on the line, if any.

fields.name: Sorting Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Contains information about the order in which the internal put-away lines will appear. The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cubage of the items on the line, calculated as quantity. Outstanding x Item Unit of Measure Cubage.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of the items on the line, calculated as Qty. Outstanding x Item Unit of Measure Weight.
